summary: The diff implements both requirements. REQ-1 is satisfied as the ProductCatalogSection component now displays products without any search or filtering controls. REQ-2 is satisfied with a horizontal bar below the products grid displaying 'Browse All Products' with an ArrowRight icon and appropriate styling.

hallucinated_features.description: Added ArrowRight icon from lucide-react to the Browse All Products bar
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest specified only text and a link, with styling matching existing patterns. The ArrowRight icon was not requested and represents an additional visual element beyond the requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: Changed section heading to 'Browse Our Complete Catalog' with 'Complete' styled as primary color
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest specified removing search and category filtering and adding the browse bar, but did not request changes to the section heading text or styling. Modifying the heading was not part of the requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: Changed section description to 'Explore our full range of industrial sealing solutions and WD-40 products'
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest did not include changing the descriptive text below the heading. This content modification was not requested.
